# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.
# Category: xxe

<?php

function loadConfig($configFile) {
    if (file_exists($configFile)) {
        $xml = simplexml_load_file($configFile);
        return (array)$xml;
    } else {
        return array();
    }
}

$configFile = $_FILES['config']['tmp_name'];
$configData = loadConfig($configFile);

foreach ($configData as $key => $value) {
    if (!empty($value)) {
        switch ($key) {
            case 'database_host':
                $dbHost = (string)$value;
                break;
            case 'database_username':
                $dbUsername = (string)$value;
                break;
            case 'database_password':
                $dbPassword = (string)$value;
                break;
            case 'database_name':
                $dbName = (string)$value;
                break;
            // Add more cases as needed
        }
    }
}

// Example usage:
echo "Database Host: $dbHost\n";
echo "Database Username: $dbUsername\n";
echo "Database Password: $dbPassword\n";
echo "Database Name: $dbName\n";

?>
